economic_notes: Nation owns 99.99% of Amik Logging Limited Partnership which owns 51% of Amik Nuna Forestry Services Joint Venture. Also holds interests in Shekak Power generating facility (IESO revenue $2,586,475), Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership (gaming revenue distributions), and various portfolio investments including Gratomic Inc., GTA Financecorp Inc., Xmet Inc. COVID-19 impacted operations in 2021.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Consolidated entity includes Constance Lake First Nation Band and Constance Lake Education Authority. Amik Logging Limited Partnership and 2500845 Ontario Inc. are accounted for using the modified equity method (GBEs). ISC funding calculated as Set Funding + Fixed Funding + Grant Funding + Flexible Funding + FNIHB = $16,322,777. Total government transfers include ISC + CMHC + OFNLP + Province of Ontario. Restricted cash (CMHC reserve funds and funds held in trust) not separately broken out on face of balance sheet from provided text. Schedule 2 expenses by object was truncated in source document. No remuneration schedule was included in the provided text. Net financial assets per statement of change: $15,835,943. Accumulated surplus per statement: $55,486,589 (minor rounding difference from $55,486,591 in operations statement). COVID-19 noted as impacting operations.
